mentions.note: Caller Betsy research: 75 affluent teenage girls all wanted Coach handbags; strong brand demand validated; buy half position, add on dips; qualitative research aligns with Wall Street thesis.
Coach +7% comp (2nd straight), Kate Spade repositioned to Gen Z via expressive luxury, Tabby icon resonating, <1% global share, $4B shareholder returns, highest margin in 25 yrs; giddy up.
